However, without a solid foundation in communication and user experience, any features or infrastructure built will not resonate with users.", "evidence_cited": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md, memory/atlas/identity.md, memory/atlas/voice.md", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: Prioritizing user-facing copy audit against the 7 Tone-of-Voice principles and shame-free language (Constitution Law 3) would unblock the most other things by ensuring our products speak to at least two target personas (Leyla, Nigar, Kamal, Rauf) without causing harm or frustration. This directly impacts onboarding, assessment, results, and sharing flow coherence.
strongest_counter: Some might argue that focusing on infrastructure or feature completion is more pressing, given the 0 revenue and 0 real users. However, without a solid foundation in communication and user experience, any features or infrastructure built will not resonate with users.
